title: Non-record: knowledge distillation teacher-student submission
author: Jeneesh1014

data.description: Teacher-student knowledge distillation with a larger teacher model training on cross-entropy and a smaller student trained on a mix of label cross-entropy and KL divergence to teacher soft predictions.
Tied embeddings are enabled in the student model.

novel_contributions: Non-record teacher-student distillation submission for the 16MB track
Uses a larger teacher model to guide a smaller student model via KL distillation
Reports an honest partial-run validation score and clearly distinguishes measured results from extrapolated estimates
Provides reproducible 8×H100 and single-GPU smoke-test commands
